title: neocastela depressa
side_effects: Neocastela depressa can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, nausea, and dizziness. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can cause liver damage, kidney failure, and even respiratory distress in severe cases. Some individuals may experience allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling, especially when handling the plant's sap. Additionally, improper use of Neocastela depressa can lead to interactions with other medications, resulting in adverse effects such as headaches and stomach problems.
